basic_details.job_title: Sports Authority of India – Dean – 2 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sports Authority of India Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Dean. Candidates with Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Sports Authority of India official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. Degree in the relevant field of Sports Science from a recognized University or Institution, 5 years regular service in Pay Level-12 or analogous post in scientific cadre

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Sports Authority of India to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: Sports Authority of India Dean Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
